flow.name: hello-world-flow
flow.doc:name: Hello World Flow
flow.doc:description: Handles HTTP GET requests on /hello and returns a static Hello World! greeting

http:listener.doc:name: GET /hello
http:listener.doc:description: Exposes an HTTP endpoint at /hello to trigger the Hello World flow

set-payload.doc:name: Set Payload
set-payload.doc:description: Sets the response payload to the static greeting: Hello World!
